name: AuthController

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: The complete state of this auth module.

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Describes the events this controller responds to.

values.name: extractAuthState
values.comment: Extracts the publicly visible auth state from the model.

values.name: logonAttempted
values.comment: Reports whether a logon has been attempted.

values.name: update
values.comment:
Updates the auth state and triggers events needed to communicate with the
auth server.

values.name: updateFromAuthCmd
values.comment:
Processes an AuthCmd representing a side effect request to perform some auth action
and to update the state.

name: Auth

aliases.name: AuthCmd
aliases.comment: Defines the side effects that consumers of the auth module may request.

aliases.name: AuthState
aliases.comment:
A sub-section of the auth module state describing whether or not the user
is logged in, what permissions they have, and when their auth token will expire.
This is the part of the auth state that most consumers of the Auth module are
interested in.
A set of operators is provided to extract information from the AuthState for
convenience.

aliases.name: Credentials
aliases.comment: Username and password based login credentials.

values.name: expiresAt
values.comment:
Checks when the current users token will expire. The user may not have a token,
or may not have one that expires at all, in which case Nothing will be returned.

values.name: hasPermission
values.comment: Checks if the current user has a particular named permission.

values.name: isLoggedIn
values.comment: Checks if the user is currently authenticated.

values.name: login
values.comment: Requests that a login be performed.

values.name: logout
values.comment:
Requests that a logout (including notifying the server of the logout) be
performed.

values.name: permissions
values.comment: Obtains a list of permissions held by the current user.

values.name: refresh
values.comment:
Requests that an attempt be made to refresh the auth token from the refresh
token.

values.name: unauthed
values.comment:
Requests that the auth state be cleared to the unauthed state. Usually in
response to receiving a 401 or 403 error from a server.

values.name: username
values.comment:
Obtains the current users username, provided they are logged in. If the user
is not logged in, the empty string will be returned.
